items.headline_en: Advancing Voice Intelligence With New Models In The Api
items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Advancing Voice Intelligence With New Models In The Api".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API published=Thu, 07 May 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/advancing-voice-intelligence-with-new-models-in-the-api description=Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences. title=Introducing ChatGPT Futures: Class of 2026 published=Wed, 06 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/introducing-chatgpt-futures-class-of-2026 description=Meet the ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026—26 student innovators using AI to build, research, and drive real-world impact. Discover how this generation is redefining learning, creativity, and opportunity with ChatGPT.
diff_excerpt: description=Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions.
+title=Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
+description=Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
title=Singular Bank helps bankers move fast with ChatGPT and Codex
description=Singular Bank built Singularity, an internal assistant using ChatGPT and Codex to help bankers save 60–90 minutes daily on meeting prep, portfolio analysis, and follow-up.

+description=Meet the ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026—26 student innovators using AI to build, research, and drive real-world impact. Discover how this generation is redefining learning, creativity, and opportunity with ChatGPT.
description=Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
-title=OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
-description=OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
description=OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
-description=Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
